title: Summa Theologiae I-II.3: The Beatific Vision
description: Aquinas on the ultimate happiness: seeing God face to face. Not faith, not works, not contemplation — but direct vision.
introduction: Aquinas on the ultimate happiness: seeing God face to face. Not faith, not works, not contemplation — but direct vision.

translation.text: Final and perfect happiness consists in the vision of the divine essence.
